# Red Thread launch packet

Generated: 2026-07-14T02:10:42.526Z

This packet is safe to keep locally or paste into a private operator note. It intentionally does not include secret values.

## Current safe environment status

| Key | State | Expected | Secret |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| NODE_ENV | missing | production | no |
| STORAGE_DRIVER | missing | postgres | no |
| DATABASE_URL | missing | real production Postgres URL | yes, do not paste value |
| DATABASE_SSL | missing | true | no |
| PUBLIC_BASE_URL | missing | final https origin only | no |
| PUBLIC_SECURITY_CONTACT | missing | real mailto: or https contact | no |
| ADMIN_PIN | missing | generated by npm run secrets | yes, do not paste value |
| SESSION_SECRET | missing | generated by npm run secrets | yes, do not paste value |
| ADMIN_ACCOUNT_IDS | missing | discord:numeric-id | no |
| MODERATOR_ACCOUNT_IDS | missing | blank or discord:numeric-id | no |
| DISCORD_CLIENT_ID | missing | Discord application client ID | no |
| DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET | missing | Discord application secret | yes, do not paste value |
| BETA_ACCESS_CODE | blank | blank for public launch | yes, do not paste value |
| PUBLIC_WRITE_PAUSED | missing | false for launch / true for emergency | no |
| ENABLE_SEED_DATA | missing | false | no |
| RELEASE_VERSION | missing | release label | no |
| COMMIT_SHA | missing | deployed commit | no |

## External setup order

1. Create or confirm the production Postgres/Supabase database.
2. Apply `db/schema.sql` and `db/rls.sql`.
3. Deploy the app with `NODE_ENV=production` and `STORAGE_DRIVER=postgres`.
4. Paste `DATABASE_URL`, `ADMIN_PIN`, `SESSION_SECRET`, and `DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET` only into the hosting dashboard.
5. Set `PUBLIC_BASE_URL` to the final public `https://` origin.
6. Set Discord OAuth redirect URL to `https://YOUR-PUBLIC-URL/auth/discord/callback`.
7. Log in once with Discord, set `ADMIN_ACCOUNT_IDS`, then run `npm run admin:roles:write` and apply `db/generated-admin-roles.sql`.
8. Export the first production backup from `管理` before inviting users.
9. Open `管理` -> `公開設定ハンドオフ`, `一般公開判定`, `公開直前チェック`, and `インシデント共有`.
10. Open `公式ボット投稿`, publish launch-day examples, and confirm `見本` / `公式` labels.
11. Share to a small group first, then watch `運用ダイジェスト` and `公開運用レポート`.

## Commands

```powershell
npm run launch:today
npm run deploy:plan
npm run release:final
npm run config:check
npm run backup:drill
$env:LIVE_BASE_URL="https://YOUR-PUBLIC-URL"
npm run deploy:verify
```

## Stop signals

- `npm run release:final` fails.
- `npm run deploy:verify` fails against the deployed URL.
- `管理` -> `一般公開判定` shows a stop item.
- `管理` -> `公開直前チェック` shows unresolved hosting, backup, Discord, or safety items.
- `管理` -> `インシデント共有` shows an incident.
- You cannot access the admin screen with the production admin account.

## Emergency brake

Set `PUBLIC_WRITE_PAUSED=true` in the hosting dashboard. This pauses ordinary posting while keeping browsing, reports, inquiries, and admin actions available.
